applying them to actual charts, much care is needed.
Unless the modifications due to benefic and malefic
associations, aspects, etc., are borne in mind, it will be
difficult to use these indications successfully.
Important Combinations
We shall now give some important combinations
pertaining to the 6th house, selected from authoritative
text-books.
If evil planets aspect or occupy the 6th, the native will
have few enemies. If good planets aspect or occupy it, the
number of enemies will increase. If the evil lord of the 6th
resides in Lagna, 8th or 10th, he will suffer from boils. If
the 6th lord is in the 6th or 8th with the Sun, he will suffer
from boils in the head; with the Moon, in the face ; with
Mars or Mercury, in the front; with Jupiter, in the nose ;
with Venus, in the eyes; with Saturn, Rahu or Ketu, in the
armpits. Lords of the 6th and 8th occupying the 7th and the
8th respectively will cause piles. The Sun, the Moon, Mars,
